settings.heading: We built CLARTÉ because nothing in the middle worked.
settings.body: There is a gap in skincare. At one end: cheap products that do little. At the other: expensive serums that work but cost too much to use daily. We looked at why that gap exists — and built around it.

settings.statement: "To give everyone with textured skin access to the same actives found in clinic-grade serums — at a price that works every day."
settings.body: Precision skincare. Without the premium. Effective skincare should not cost €70 for 30ml. You should not ration your serum to twice a week just to make it last. Results come from using it daily. Daily use needs a price you can keep. CLARTÉ is €29 because that is what fair looks like.

settings.title: Evidence First
settings.description: Every claim we make is traceable. We do not use words like "miracle" or "guaranteed." We cite studies. We show data. We tell you what each ingredient does.

settings.title: Safety First
settings.description: We made CLARTÉ for people who have been hurt by strong actives. Retinaldehyde is released slowly. Gluconolactone stays on the surface. Ceramides protect your barrier while skin repairs itself.

settings.title: Honest Price
settings.description: €29. That is what it costs. We invest in the formula. Not the packaging markup. EU-compliant under Regulation 1223/2009. Safe for daily use. Every ingredient has a function — nothing decorative.

settings.text: Every ingredient has a function — nothing decorative

settings.heading: Formulated by Cosmetic Scientists. Validated by Dermatologists.
settings.body: The best retinoid — retinaldehyde — was used by luxury brands to justify high prices. No brand made it available at a price you could sustain. We looked at why that gap exists. The answer was simple. CLARTÉ changes that. Advanced retinoid. Honest price. Made for daily use.
settings.credential_3: Retinaldehyde not covered by EU Regulation 2024/996
settings.promise: Our promise: If your skin does not visibly improve in 30 days of regular use, we refund you. No questions.

settings.heading: Start with €29.
settings.subheading: Advanced retinoid. Honest price. Visible results.
